footer.desc: Nexus supports the university community with digital resources and coworking spaces designed for the future.

services.title: Comprehensive Solutions for your Studies
services.desc: From access to specialized literature to physical spaces designed to maximize your productivity.
services.lib_desc: Thousands of books, magazines, and documents at your fingertips. Read online or download your favorites.
services.cow_desc: Book study rooms, meeting spaces, or shared desks in real time.

services.events_desc: Exclusive workshops, reading clubs, and networking for members of the Nexus community.
